data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for target flexibility.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for holding target flexibility, but the evidence provided does not demonstrate that this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for target flexibility but lacks concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm its implementation or effectiveness. Specifically, there are no details on how the system handles flexibility in terms of calendar, capacity pool, resource, offer version, or custom target, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of implementation or functionality for holding target flexibility.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for target flexibility
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the target flexibility requirement.
